trivia_bullets.text: Foil variant of Satyr's Cunning (THB no. 152). Both variants share Scryfall UUID 646d8201-be68-42fa-bcfd-42d81a2ad195; inventory tracks them separately. First and only printing.

Carries the Escape keyword — THB's signature graveyard-rebuy mechanic. The art (satyr climbing out of an underworld fissure) is a direct visual expression of Escape, one of the tighter flavor-mechanical fusions in the set. Art by Deruchenko Alexander.
"It's hard to keep a satyr down, even in the Underworld." The line is both lore-accurate and a mechanical wink: cast it, graveyard, cast it again.

Hipsters of the Coast cube review skeptical: 'I've seen some talk about this card being a good recursive one drop for Mono Red, and I'm not sure I agree.' Common review grade F in limited. Sees Pioneer play in Transmogrify/Boros Creativity as cheap recurring sacrifice fodder.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: THB Cube Review Red 2020-03
Hipsters of the Coast: THB Common Review 2020-01
WebSearch: Satyr's Cunning Pioneer via mtgdecks.net snippet
